title: Price's Candles - Altar Candle - 250mm x 80mm - Unscented - Up to 50 Hour Burn Time - Smokeless & Dripless - Ideal for All Occasions
features: UNSCENTED & DRIPLESS - Made from high-quality wax, our altar candles are unscented, smokeless and dripless! These tapered candles keep home clean from fumes and strong smells - ideal for everyday use
description: Product Description Our unscented solid wax altar candles are made from the highest quality wax to deliver a bright, clean, smokeless and non-drip burn. This off-white pillar candle is perfect for adding glamour to weddings and for lighting up your home and garden. Safety Warning Be careful not to use candles near flammable materials. Do not leave candles unattended and dispose of the remains properly.
